meta.title: InstaPay Checkout — Turn every chat into a sale
meta.description: Create an InstaPay payment link in seconds and send it to your customer on WhatsApp. No website, no app, no hassle.

loginPage.title: Sign in to your dashboard
loginPage.subtitle: Use the same account you used when you registered

hero.headline: Create an InstaPay payment link — in seconds
hero.subheadline: Create an InstaPay payment link in two seconds and send it to your customer on WhatsApp. No website, no app, no hassle.
hero.trust: 100% free · No credit card · Ready in 2 minutes

items.title: Telling customers 'transfer to this number and send me a screenshot'
items.description: Old-school and no guarantee the transfer actually arrived.

items.title: Tracking every order manually in notes
items.description: Everything in your head or phone notes — easy to forget.

items.title: Not sure who paid and who didn't
items.description: Asking every customer: did you transfer? No quick way to verify.

items.title: Customers drop off because payment is complicated
items.description: The more steps, the more people bounce.

steps.title: Sign up in 2 minutes
steps.description: Enter your business name and InstaPay account — that's it.

steps.title: Create an instant payment link
steps.description: Send the product name and price to the bot on WhatsApp — you get a link in a second.

steps.title: Customer pays, you track
steps.description: Customer opens the link, transfers via InstaPay, and confirms. You get an instant notification.

features.title: Everything you need in one place

items.title: Instant payment links
items.description: Create a link for any product or service in a second from WhatsApp.

items.title: Payment page with your brand
items.description: Your business name, your colors — customers feel like they're buying directly from you.

items.title: Instant notifications
items.description: The moment a customer pays, you get a WhatsApp notification with details and screenshot.

items.title: Order tracking
items.description: All orders in one place — who paid, who hasn't, and the total.

items.title: Auto catalog
items.description: Every product you create a link for is saved automatically — over time you build a full catalog.

items.title: Payment verification
items.description: Customer sees the masked recipient name on InstaPay before transferring — trust from the first moment.

socialProof.title: Sellers like you are getting paid faster

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.quote: I used to spend half an hour tracking every order. Now it's all automatic.

testimonials.name: Ahmed R.
testimonials.quote: My customers pay faster because the link is simple and direct.

testimonials.name: Nour A.
testimonials.quote: Best part is there's no app — everything's on WhatsApp.

pricing.title: Start free — scale when you're ready

finalCta.title: Ready to get paid the easy way?
finalCta.subtitle: Sign up in 2 minutes and send your first payment link to a customer today.

footer.tagline: The easiest way to accept InstaPay

meta.title: Register your business — InstaPay Checkout
meta.description: Sign up in 2 minutes and start accepting InstaPay payments from your customers via WhatsApp.

page.title: Register your business on InstaPay Checkout
page.subtitle: 2 simple steps and you're accepting payments online

step1.title: See how your payment page will look
step1.description: Everything you see here is a preview of the page you'll send to your customer at checkout — pick your business type and tweak the details if you like
step1.demoLabel: This is what your customer will see when you send them the payment link
step1.expandLabel: Preview — you can change the details if you like

placeholders.instapayNumber: The number customers will transfer to

step2.maskedNameWhy: Why do we ask for the masked name?
step2.maskedNameExplanation: When a customer transfers via InstaPay, the app shows them a masked recipient name before they confirm. We display the same name on the payment page so the customer can verify they're sending to the right person.

step3.title: Create your account
step3.subtitle: Sign up so you can access and manage your store later
step3.forgotSent: Sent! Check your email and click the link to set a new password.
step3.forgotPrompt: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

validation.businessNameMin: Business name must be at least 2 characters
validation.businessNameMax: Business name must be under 100 characters
validation.maskedNameAsterisk: Masked name must contain at least one *
validation.whatsappValid: Valid Egyptian WhatsApp number — e.g. 01XXXXXXXXX or 10XXXXXXXX
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

confirmation.title: You're all set! 🎉
confirmation.subtitle: Your account is ready. We'll send you a WhatsApp message — open WhatsApp and create your first payment link!

errors.serverError: Server issue — try again in a bit
errors.duplicateEmail: This email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
errors.duplicateNumber: This number is already registered. Try a different number or contact us.
errors.networkError: Make sure you're connected to the internet and the backend is running
errors.googleNoEmail: This Google account has no email — try creating an account with email instead.
errors.accountCreated: Account created! Saving your store details...
errors.googleNotEnabled: Google sign-in is not enabled — enable it in Firebase Console
errors.unauthorizedDomain: This domain is not allowed — add it in Firebase → Authorized domains
errors.emailInUse: This email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
errors.emailNotEnabled: Email sign-up is not enabled — enable it in Firebase Console
errors.invalidCredentials: Wrong email or password. Try again.
errors.userNotFound: No account with this email. Create a new account first.
errors.resetEmailSent: We've sent you an email to reset your password

meta.title: Checkout - InstaPay Payment
meta.description: Complete your InstaPay payment securely. Verify, pay, and confirm your transaction.

instructions: Open your bank app or wallet that supports InstaPay
step1.verifyTitle: How do you know you're sending to the right person?
step1.verifyIntro: After entering the account number, InstaPay will show you a masked recipient name before you confirm the transfer. You should see:
step1.verifyMatch: If the name matches, you're sending to the right account. Go ahead and confirm the transfer!
step1.ensureTransfer: Make sure you see "Transfer successful" in your app before continuing

step2.phoneLabel: Phone number used for the transfer
step2.phoneHint: So the seller can match their InstaPay notification
step2.screenshotHint: Upload a screenshot to confirm your InstaPay transfer
step2.completeFields: Complete all required fields to continue

step3.successSubtitle: Your payment details have been sent to {sellerName}. The seller will review and confirm your order soon.
step3.statusSubtitle: You'll get a confirmation once the seller verifies your payment. Usually takes a few minutes.

dashboard.title: Welcome to your dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your store dashboard — soon you'll be able to see orders, add products, and send payment links to customers.
dashboard.whatsappHint: For now, create your first payment link via WhatsApp 👇
